function.name: get_day_of_week
function.description: Get the day of week for a given date.
function.long_description: Returns the day of week name and numeric value for a specified date.
example_user_queries: Call get_day_of_week with date 15/08/2026 and format %d/%m/%Y.
find the day of the week for 2026-07-04.
whats the day of the week for 2026-07-04?
Find weekday name and number for 2026-12-25.
Determine the day of the week for 2026-08-15.
What is the day of the week for 2026-08-15 in format %Y-%m-%d?
